creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Miroslav Lachman from comment #0)

You wrote:

> I upgraded from 3.2.0 to 3.2.3. 

Since there was never a 3.2.0 version in the ports, this could cause the problem.

What does pkg info say about:
$ pkg info -f -d redmine

What happens when you pkg delete and pkg install it again?

Greetings,
Torsten
